chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-533 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-1553/2020 2. For orders on office objections 3. For hearing of MA-1554/2020 4. For hearing of main case. 18.12.2020. Mr. Abdul Haque Qureshi, advocate for petitioner. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. The petitioner has impugned before this Court an interim order dated 12.10.2020 passed by learned Civil / Family Judge-V, Hyderabad, whereby the petitioner has been directed to pay rupees six thousand per month as maintenance for his minor till final decision of the suit. Admittedly, the interim order of Family Court is not subject to appeal therefore, the constitutional petition against such order could not be maintained as a substitute of an appeal. Such being the legal position, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
